{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Saeya's sword
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Saeya uses a rainbow sword.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Saeya uses a colored glass [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“Tidewalkers and Ghost-Blades,” Naru Saeya observed, hefting her colored glass sword.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
